title: Flower Variants
description: Adds additional variations for each flower while sticking to the vanilla feeling. Also removes firefly animation from firefly bush.
body:
# Flower Variants

This pack adds four additional variants for each flower in the game.  
The model used is random, based on the block location in the world.  
There are some special features:

- The potted version will always be the vanilla flower
- Alliums use a lavender-inspired design
- Daisies have five variants
- Four additional variants for Dead Bushes
- Removed the animated emissive texture from Firefly Bushes
- Added four additional variants for Firefly Bushes
- Golden Dandelions and Torch Flowers aren't changed
- All the two-tall flowers aren't changed

Get a quick overview in this video from 7:43 to 9:42:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QVHNhv8FHGo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Have a look at the gallery for more images :)

### Credit
This pack was inspired by fWhips fWoliage Upgrades. Make sure to check out his [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@fWhip) channel!

If you have any feedback, feel free to join my Discord and let me know.
Make sure to check out my other packs on my Modrinth profile as well :D
